// ==UserScript==
// @name         X Blocker Suite - Premium UI

// @match        https://twitter.com/*

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Inject premium styles
    GM_addStyle(`
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;900&display=swap');
        
        /* Main FAB Button */
        .xb-fab {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 30px;
            right: 30px;
            width: 65px;
            height: 65px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6), 0 0 0 0 rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
            cursor: pointer;
            z-index: 999999;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
            animation: fabPulse 2s infinite;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        @keyframes fabPulse {
            0% { box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6), 0 0 0 0 rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4); }
            50% { box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6), 0 0 0 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0); }
            100% { box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6), 0 0 0 0 rgba(102, 126, 234, 0); }
        }
        
        .xb-fab:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1) rotate(90deg);
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);
        }
        
        .xb-fab-icon {
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            fill: white;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xb-fab.active .xb-fab-icon {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }
        
        /* Main Panel */
        .xb-panel {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 110px;
            right: 30px;
            width: 420px;
            max-height: 600px;
            background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 24px;
            box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75);
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.9);
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
            pointer-events: none;
            overflow: hidden;
            z-index: 999998;
        }
        
        .xb-panel.active {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            pointer-events: all;
        }
        
        /* Panel Header */
        .xb-header {
            padding: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2) 0%, rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.2) 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }
        
        .xb-title {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            margin: 0 0 8px 0;
            letter-spacing: -0.5px;
        }
        
        .xb-subtitle {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        /* Stats Bar */
        .xb-stats {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            padding: 16px 24px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }
        
        .xb-stat {
            flex: 1;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .xb-stat-value {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            display: block;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }
        
        .xb-stat-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }
        
        /* Navigation Tabs */
        .xb-tabs {
            display: flex;
            padding: 0 24px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .xb-tab {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;

            font-weight: 500;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .xb-tab:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            color: #fff;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }
        
        .xb-tab.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            color: #fff;
            border-color: transparent;
        }
        
        /* Content Area */
        .xb-content {
            padding: 24px;
            max-height: 350px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        
        .xb-content::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }
        
        .xb-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        
        .xb-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        
        /* Action Cards */
        .xb-card {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);

            margin-bottom: 16px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        
        .xb-card:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        }
        
        .xb-card-title {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #fff;
            margin: 0 0 8px 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        
        .xb-card-icon {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border-radius: 6px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        
        .xb-card-description {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            margin: 0 0 16px 0;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        
        /* Buttons */
        .xb-button {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: white;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .xb-button:before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: -100%;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }
        
        .xb-button:hover:before {
            left: 100%;
        }
        
        .xb-button:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
        }
        
        .xb-button:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        .xb-button.secondary {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }
        
        .xb-button.danger {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5576c 0%, #f093fb 100%);
        }
        
        /* Toggle Switch */
        .xb-toggle {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        
        .xb-toggle-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
        }
        
        .xb-switch {
            position: relative;
            width: 50px;
            height: 26px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 13px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xb-switch.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        }
        
        .xb-switch-thumb {
            position: absolute;
            top: 3px;
            left: 3px;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        
        .xb-switch.active .xb-switch-thumb {
            transform: translateX(24px);
        }
        
        /* Loading Spinner */
        .xb-spinner {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50%;
            border-top-color: white;
            animation: spin 1s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        
        /* Notification Toast */
        .xb-toast {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 30px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(100px);
            background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 16px 24px;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: white;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 999999;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        
        .xb-toast.show {
            transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: all;
        }
        
        .xb-toast.success {
            border-color: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.3);
            background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.95);
        }
        
        .xb-toast.error {
            border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
            background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.95);
        }
        
        /* Progress Bar */
        .xb-progress {
            width: 100%;
            height: 4px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }
        
        .xb-progress-bar {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            transition: width 0.3s ease;
            width: 0%;
        }
        
        /* AI Filter Config */
        .xb-filter-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border-radius: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .xb-filter-name {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
        }
        
        .xb-filter-threshold {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }
        
        .xb-slider {
            width: 100px;
            height: 4px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border-radius: 2px;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .xb-slider-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            width: 75%;
        }
        
        .xb-slider-thumb {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 75%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
        }
        
        .xb-slider-value {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            min-width: 30px;
            text-align: right;
        }
    `);

    // Initialize state
    let panelActive = false;
    let activeTab = 'quick';
    let stats = {
        blocked: GM_getValue('totalBlocked', 0),
        hidden: GM_getValue('totalHidden', 0),
        whitelisted: GM_getValue('whitelistCount', 0)
    };

    // Create UI elements
    function createUI() {
        // FAB Button
        const fab = document.createElement('div');
        fab.className = 'xb-fab';
        fab.innerHTML = `
            <svg class="xb-fab-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path d="M19 13h-6v6h-2v-6H5v-2h6V5h2v6h6v2z"/>
            </svg>
        `;
        
        // Main Panel
        const panel = document.createElement('div');
        panel.className = 'xb-panel';
        panel.innerHTML = `
            <div class="xb-header">
                <h1 class="xb-title">X Blocker Suite</h1>
                <p class="xb-subtitle">Advanced protection for your timeline</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="xb-stats">
                <div class="xb-stat">
                    <span class="xb-stat-value">${stats.blocked}</span>
                    <span class="xb-stat-label">Blocked</span>
                </div>
                <div class="xb-stat">
                    <span class="xb-stat-value">${stats.hidden}</span>
                    <span class="xb-stat-label">Hidden</span>
                </div>
                <div class="xb-stat">
                    <span class="xb-stat-value">${stats.whitelisted}</span>
                    <span class="xb-stat-label">Whitelist</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="xb-tabs">
                <div class="xb-tab active" data-tab="quick">Quick Actions</div>
                <div class="xb-tab" data-tab="lists">Block Lists</div>
                <div class="xb-tab" data-tab="ai">AI Filter</div>
                <div class="xb-tab" data-tab="settings">Settings</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="xb-content" id="xb-content">
                ${getTabContent('quick')}
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(fab);
        document.body.appendChild(panel);
        
        // Event listeners
        fab.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);
        
        // Tab switching
        panel.querySelectorAll('.xb-tab').forEach(tab => {
            tab.addEventListener('click', () => switchTab(tab.dataset.tab));
        });
    }
    
    function togglePanel() {
        panelActive = !panelActive;
        document.querySelector('.xb-fab').classList.toggle('active', panelActive);
        document.querySelector('.xb-panel').classList.toggle('active', panelActive);
    }
    
    function switchTab(tabName) {
        activeTab = tabName;
        document.querySelectorAll('.xb-tab').forEach(tab => {
            tab.classList.toggle('active', tab.dataset.tab === tabName);
        });
        document.getElementById('xb-content').innerHTML = getTabContent(tabName);
        attachTabEventListeners(tabName);
    }
    
    function getTabContent(tab) {
        const contents = {
            quick: `
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">⚡</div>
                        Page Actions
                    </div>
                    <p class="xb-card-description">Quick blocking actions for the current page</p>
                    
                    <button class="xb-button danger" id="xb-block-comments">
                        Block First 20 Comments
                    </button>
                    <div class="xb-progress" style="display: none;">
                        <div class="xb-progress-bar"></div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <button class="xb-button secondary" style="margin-top: 12px;" id="xb-mute-comments">
                        Mute First 50 Comments
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">🛡️</div>
                        Quick Block
                    </div>
                    <p class="xb-card-description">Block or whitelist specific users</p>
                    
                    <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px;">
                        <input type="text" id="xb-username-input" placeholder="Enter @username" style="
                            flex: 1;
                            padding: 12px;
                            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
                            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
                            border-radius: 12px;
                            color: white;
                            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
                        ">
                        <button class="xb-button" id="xb-whitelist-user" style="width: auto;">
                            Add to Whitelist
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `,
            
            lists: `
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">📋</div>
                        Shared Block Lists
                    </div>
                    <p class="xb-card-description">Community-maintained lists of spam accounts</p>
                    
                    ${[
                        { id: '1677334530754248706', name: 'Main Spam List', count: '2.5k' },
                        { id: '1683810394287079426', name: 'Secondary List', count: '1.8k' },
                        { id: '1699049983159259593', name: 'Crypto Scams', count: '956' },
                        { id: '1770809941151896014', name: 'Adult Content', count: '3.2k' }
                    ].map(list => `
                        <div class="xb-filter-item" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
                            <div>
                                <div class="xb-filter-name">${list.name}</div>
                                <div style="font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);">${list.count} accounts</div>
                            </div>
                            <button class="xb-button" style="width: auto; padding: 8px 16px;" 
                                    onclick="window.open('https://x.com/i/lists/${list.id}/members', '_blank')">
                                Open List
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    `).join('')}
                    
                    <button class="xb-button danger" id="xb-block-special" style="margin-top: 16px;">
                        🚨 Block Priority Scammers
                    </button>
                </div>
            `,
            
            ai: `
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">🤖</div>
                        AI Content Filter
                    </div>
                    <p class="xb-card-description">Configure AI-powered content filtering thresholds</p>
                    
                    <div class="xb-toggle">
                        <span class="xb-toggle-label">Enable AI Filtering</span>
                        <div class="xb-switch ${GM_getValue('aiFilterEnabled', true) ? 'active' : ''}" id="xb-ai-toggle">
                            <div class="xb-switch-thumb"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    ${[
                        { name: 'Negativity', key: 'negativity', value: 0.9 },
                        { name: 'Sexual Content', key: 'sexual_content', value: 0.75 },
                        { name: 'Hate Speech', key: 'hate_speech', value: 0.8 },
                        { name: 'Spam', key: 'spam', value: 0.85 },
                        { name: 'Low Quality', key: 'low_quality', value: 0.75 }
                    ].map(filter => `
                        <div class="xb-filter-item">
                            <span class="xb-filter-name">${filter.name}</span>
                            <div class="xb-filter-threshold">
                                <div class="xb-slider" data-key="${filter.key}">
                                    <div class="xb-slider-fill" style="width: ${filter.value * 100}%"></div>
                                    <div class="xb-slider-thumb" style="left: ${filter.value * 100}%"></div>
                                </div>
                                <span class="xb-slider-value">${filter.value}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `).join('')}
                    
                    <button class="xb-button secondary" id="xb-reset-filters" style="margin-top: 16px;">
                        Reset to Defaults
                    </button>
                </div>
            `,
            
            settings: `
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">⚙️</div>
                        General Settings
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="xb-toggle">
                        <span class="xb-toggle-label">Show notifications</span>
                        <div class="xb-switch active">
                            <div class="xb-switch-thumb"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="xb-toggle">
                        <span class="xb-toggle-label">Auto-hide promoted posts</span>
                        <div class="xb-switch">
                            <div class="xb-switch-thumb"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="xb-toggle">
                        <span class="xb-toggle-label">Restore Twitter logo</span>
                        <div class="xb-switch active">
                            <div class="xb-switch-thumb"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">💾</div>
                        Data Management
                    </div>
                    
                    <button class="xb-button secondary" id="xb-export-data">
                        Export Block Lists
                    </button>
                    
                    <button class="xb-button danger" id="xb-clear-cache" style="margin-top: 12px;">
                        Clear All Cache
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div class="xb-card">
                    <div class="xb-card-title">
                        <div class="xb-card-icon">💝</div>
                        Support Development
                    </div>
                    
                    <button class="xb-button" onclick="window.open('https://buymeacoffee.com/finetuning', '_blank')">
                        Buy Me a Coffee ☕
                    </button>
                </div>
            `
        };
        
        return contents[tab] || contents.quick;
    }
    
    function attachTabEventListeners(tab) {
        // Add event listeners based on active tab
        if (tab === 'quick') {
            document.getElementById('xb-block-comments')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                showToast('Blocking first 20 comments...', 'info');
                // Call your existing block function
            });
            
            document.getElementById('xb-mute-comments')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                showToast('Muting first 50 comments...', 'info');
                // Call your existing mute function
            });
            
            document.getElementById('xb-whitelist-user')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const username = document.getElementById('xb-username-input').value;
                if (username) {
                    showToast(`Added @${username} to whitelist`, 'success');
                    stats.whitelisted++;
                    updateStats();
                }
            });
        }
        
        if (tab === 'ai') {
            document.getElementById('xb-ai-toggle')?.addEventListener('click', function() {
                this.classList.toggle('active');
                GM_setValue('aiFilterEnabled', this.classList.contains('active'));
                showToast('AI filtering ' + (this.classList.contains('active') ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'), 'success');
            });
        }
        
        if (tab === 'settings') {
            document.getElementById('xb-clear-cache')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (confirm('Clear all cached data? This cannot be undone.')) {
                    showToast('Cache cleared successfully', 'success');
                }
            });
        }
    }
    
    function showToast(message, type = 'info') {
        const toast = document.createElement('div');
        toast.className = `xb-toast ${type}`;
        toast.textContent = message;
        document.body.appendChild(toast);
        
        setTimeout(() => toast.classList.add('show'), 10);
        setTimeout(() => {
            toast.classList.remove('show');
            setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);
        }, 3000);
    }
    
    function updateStats() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.xb-stat-value').forEach((el, i) => {
            const values = [stats.blocked, stats.hidden, stats.whitelisted];
            el.textContent = values[i];
        });
    }
    
    // Initialize the UI when page loads
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', createUI);
    } else {
        createUI();
    }
    
    // Listen for URL changes
    let lastUrl = location.href;
    new MutationObserver(() => {
        const url = location.href;
        if (url !== lastUrl) {
            lastUrl = url;
            // Update UI based on current page
        }
    }).observe(document, { subtree: true, childList: true });
    
})();

 // ==UserScript==
// @name         X Blocker Suite - Advanced Control Center
// @version      3.0.0
// @description  Revolutionary control panel for X blocking with AI-powered features
// @match        https://twitter.com/*

// @grant        GM_addStyle
// @require      https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/axios@0.25.0/dist/axios.min.js

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Inject advanced styles
    GM_addStyle(`
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;900&display=swap');
        
        /* Main Control Center */
        .xbc-control {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            z-index: 999999;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }
        
        /* Minimized State - Floating Orb */
        .xbc-orb {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1DA1F2 0%, #0d8bd9 100%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.4), 
                        0 0 0 0 rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.4),
                        inset 0 -2px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .xbc-orb:before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            left: -50%;
            width: 200%;
            height: 200%;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3), transparent);
            transform: rotate(45deg);
            transition: all 0.5s;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        
        .xbc-orb:hover:before {
            animation: orbShine 0.5s ease-in-out;
        }
        
        @keyframes orbShine {
            0% { transform: translateX(-100%) translateY(-100%) rotate(45deg); opacity: 0; }
            50% { opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translateX(100%) translateY(100%) rotate(45deg); opacity: 0; }
        }
        
        .xbc-orb:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.6), 
                        0 0 0 3px rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.2),
                        inset 0 -2px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        
        .xbc-orb-icon {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            fill: white;
            filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2));
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-orb.active .xbc-orb-icon {
            transform: rotate(45deg);
        }
        
        /* Notification Badge */
        .xbc-badge {
            position: absolute;
            top: -4px;
            right: -4px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff3b3b, #ff6b6b);
            color: white;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 700;
            padding: 2px 6px;

        /* Expanded Panel */
        .xbc-panel {

        .xbc-switch.active {

            position: absolute;

            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;

        }

            color: #8899a6;

            text-decoration: none;

        }
        
        .xbc-footer-link:hover {

        }
        
        /* Loading State */
        .xbc-loading {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;

            background: rgba(15, 20, 27, 0.95);

        }

            opacity: 1;

        .xbc-loader {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: 3px solid rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.3);

            border-radius: 50%;

        }
        
        @keyframes spin {

        }
        
        /* Progress Bar */
        .xbc-progress {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 3px;
            background: rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.2);

        }
        
        .xbc-progress.active {

        .xbc-progress-bar {

            transition: width 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        /* Tooltips */
        .xbc-tooltip {
            position: absolute;
            background: #15202b;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: white;
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
            z-index: 20;
        }
        
        .xbc-tooltip.show {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        /* Animations */
        @keyframes slideIn {
            from {
                transform: translateX(100%);
                opacity: 0;
            }
            to {
                transform: translateX(0);
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }
        
        .xbc-slide-in {
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-out;
        }
    `);

    // Initialize state
    let isExpanded = false;
    let stats = {
        blocked: GM_getValue('totalBlocked', 0),
        hidden: GM_getValue('totalHidden', 0),
        todayBlocked: GM_getValue('todayBlocked', 0),
        aiFiltered: GM_getValue('aiFiltered', 0)
    };
    let isAiEnabled = GM_getValue('aiFilterEnabled', true);
    let isProcessing = false;

    // Create the control center
    function createControlCenter() {
        const control = document.createElement('div');
        control.className = 'xbc-control';
        control.innerHTML = `
            <!-- Floating Orb -->
            <div class="xbc-orb" id="xbc-orb">
                <svg class="xbc-orb-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path d="M19 6.41L17.59 5 12 10.59 6.41 5 5 6.41 10.59 12 5 17.59 6.41 19 12 13.41 17.59 19 19 17.59 13.41 12z"/>
                </svg>
                <span class="xbc-badge" id="xbc-badge" style="display: none;">0</span>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Expanded Panel -->
            <div class="xbc-panel" id="xbc-panel">
                <!-- Loading Overlay -->
                <div class="xbc-loading" id="xbc-loading">
                    <div class="xbc-loader"></div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Progress Bar -->
                <div class="xbc-progress" id="xbc-progress">
                    <div class="xbc-progress-bar" id="xbc-progress-bar"></div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Header -->
                <div class="xbc-header">
                    <div class="xbc-header-content">
                        <h2 class="xbc-title">X Blocker Control</h2>
                        <p class="xbc-subtitle">Advanced protection for your timeline</p>
                        
                        <div class="xbc-stats-bar">
                            <div class="xbc-stat-pill">
                                <div class="xbc-stat-pill-icon">🚫</div>
                                <span id="xbc-stat-blocked">${stats.blocked}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="xbc-stat-pill">
                                <div class="xbc-stat-pill-icon">👁️</div>
                                <span id="xbc-stat-hidden">${stats.hidden}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="xbc-stat-pill">
                                <div class="xbc-stat-pill-icon">📊</div>
                                <span id="xbc-stat-today">${stats.todayBlocked}</span> today
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Actions Container -->
                <div class="xbc-actions">
                    <!-- Quick Actions Grid -->
                    <div class="xbc-quick-actions">
                        <div class="xbc-quick-btn" id="xbc-quick-block">
                            <span class="xbc-quick-btn-icon">🚫</span>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-label">Quick Block</div>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-value">20 replies</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="xbc-quick-btn" id="xbc-quick-mute">
                            <span class="xbc-quick-btn-icon">🔇</span>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-label">Quick Mute</div>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-value">50 accounts</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="xbc-quick-btn" id="xbc-quick-hide">
                            <span class="xbc-quick-btn-icon">👁️‍🗨️</span>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-label">Hide Spam</div>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-value">Auto</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="xbc-quick-btn" id="xbc-quick-whitelist">
                            <span class="xbc-quick-btn-icon">✅</span>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-label">Whitelist</div>
                            <div class="xbc-quick-btn-value">Protected</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- AI Filter Section -->
                    <div class="xbc-ai-section">
                        <div class="xbc-ai-toggle">
                            <div class="xbc-ai-label">
                                <div class="xbc-ai-icon">🤖</div>
                                <span>AI Content Filter</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="xbc-switch ${isAiEnabled ? 'active' : ''}" id="xbc-ai-switch">
                                <div class="xbc-switch-thumb"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="xbc-ai-stats">
                            <div class="xbc-ai-stat">

                            </div>
                            <div class="xbc-ai-stat">
                                <div class="xbc-ai-stat-value">0.75</div>

                    <!-- Power Actions -->

                <!-- Footer -->
                <div class="xbc-footer">
                    <a href="#" class="xbc-footer-link" id="xbc-settings">⚙️ Settings</a>
                    <a href="#" class="xbc-footer-link" id="xbc-lists">📋 Block Lists</a>
                    <a href="https://buymeacoffee.com/finetuning" target="_blank" class="xbc-footer-link">☕ Support</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(control);
        
        // Initialize event listeners
        initializeEventListeners();
        
        // Update badge if there are pending actions
        updateBadge();
    }
    
    function initializeEventListeners() {
        const orb = document.getElementById('xbc-orb');
        const panel = document.getElementById('xbc-panel');
        const aiSwitch = document.getElementById('xbc-ai-switch');
        
        // Toggle panel
        orb.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            orb.classList.toggle('active', isExpanded);
            panel.classList.toggle('active', isExpanded);
            
            if (isExpanded) {
                panel.classList.add('xbc-slide-in');
            }
        });
        
        // Quick actions
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-block').addEventListener('click', () => {
            executeAction('block', 20);
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-mute').addEventListener('click', () => {
            executeAction('mute', 50);
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-hide').addEventListener('click', () => {
            executeAction('hide', 'auto');
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-whitelist').addEventListener('click', () => {
            promptWhitelist();
        });
        
        // AI toggle
        aiSwitch.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isAiEnabled = !isAiEnabled;
            aiSwitch.classList.toggle('active', isAiEnabled);
            GM_setValue('aiFilterEnabled', isAiEnabled);
            showNotification(isAiEnabled ? 'AI Filter Enabled' : 'AI Filter Disabled');
        });
        
        // Power actions
        document.getElementById('xbc-nuke-comments').addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (confirm('This will block ALL comments on this page. Continue?')) {
                executeAction('nuke', 'all');
            }
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-emergency-block').addEventListener('click', () => {
            executeAction('emergency', 'special');
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-scan-page').addEventListener('click', () => {
            executeAction('scan', 'deep');
        });
        
        // Close panel when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (isExpanded && !e.target.closest('.xbc-control')) {
                isExpanded = false;
                orb.classList.remove('active');
                panel.classList.remove('active');
            }
        });
    }
    
    function executeAction(action, target) {
        if (isProcessing) return;
        
        isProcessing = true;
        showLoading(true);
        showProgress(true);
        
        let progress = 0;
        const progressInterval = setInterval(() => {
            progress += Math.random() * 20;
            if (progress > 90) progress = 90;
            updateProgress(progress);
        }, 200);
        
        // Simulate action execution
        setTimeout(() => {
            clearInterval(progressInterval);
            updateProgress(100);
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                showLoading(false);
                showProgress(false);
                isProcessing = false;
                
                // Update stats
                if (action === 'block') {
                    stats.blocked += target;
                    stats.todayBlocked += target;
                } else if (action === 'hide') {
                    stats.hidden += 10;
                }
                
                updateStats();
                showNotification(`Successfully executed ${action} action!`);
            }, 500);
        }, 2000);
    }
    
    function promptWhitelist() {
        const username = prompt('Enter username to whitelist (without @):');
        if (username) {
            showNotification(`Added @${username} to whitelist`);
        }
    }
    
    function showLoading(show) {
        document.getElementById('xbc-loading').classList.toggle('active', show);
    }
    
    function showProgress(show) {
        document.getElementById('xbc-progress').classList.toggle('active', show);
        if (!show) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                updateProgress(0);
            }, 300);
        }
    }
    
    function updateProgress(percent) {
        document.getElementById('xbc-progress-bar').style.width = percent + '%';
    }
    
    function updateStats() {
        document.getElementById('xbc-stat-blocked').textContent = stats.blocked;
        document.getElementById('xbc-stat-hidden').textContent = stats.hidden;
        document.getElementById('xbc-stat-today').textContent = stats.todayBlocked;
        document.getElementById('xbc-ai-filtered').textContent = stats.aiFiltered;
        
        GM_setValue('totalBlocked', stats.blocked);
        GM_setValue('totalHidden', stats.hidden);
        GM_setValue('todayBlocked', stats.todayBlocked);
        GM_setValue('aiFiltered', stats.aiFiltered);
    }
    
    function updateBadge() {
        const badge = document.getElementById('xbc-badge');
        const pendingActions = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5); // Simulate pending actions
        
        if (pendingActions > 0) {
            badge.textContent = pendingActions;
            badge.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            badge.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }
    
    function showNotification(message) {
        // Create a simple notification (you can enhance this)
        const notif = document.createElement('div');
        notif.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 100px;
            right: 20px;
            background: #1DA1F2;
            color: white;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.4);
            z-index: 999999;
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-out;
        `;
        notif.textContent = message;
        document.body.appendChild(notif);
        
        setTimeout(() => {
            notif.style.animation = 'slideOut 0.3s ease-out';
            setTimeout(() => notif.remove(), 300);
        }, 3000);
    }
    
    // Initialize when page loads
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', createControlCenter);
    } else {
        createControlCenter();
    }
    
    // Reset today's stats at midnight
    const now = new Date();
    const tomorrow = new Date(now);
    tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1);
    tomorrow.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const msUntilMidnight = tomorrow - now;
    
    setTimeout(() => {
        stats.todayBlocked = 0;
        GM_setValue('todayBlocked', 0);
        updateStats();
        
        // Then reset every 24 hours
        setInterval(() => {
            stats.todayBlocked = 0;
            GM_setValue('todayBlocked', 0);
            updateStats();
        }, 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    }, msUntilMidnight);
    
})();

Here's the updated code that integrates the core blocking functionality from your original script with the new UI:

```javascript
// ==UserScript==
// @name         X Blocker Suite - Advanced Control Center
// @version      3.0.0
// @description  Revolutionary control panel for X blocking with AI-powered features
// @match        https://twitter.com/*
// @match        https://mobile.twitter.com/*
// @match        https://tweetdeck.twitter.com/*
// @match        https://x.com/*
// @match        https://mobile.x.com/*
// @match        https://tweetdeck.x.com/*
// @exclude      https://twitter.com/account/*
// @exclude      https://x.com/account/*
// @grant        GM_setValue
// @grant        GM_getValue
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// @grant        GM_addStyle
// @grant        GM_registerMenuCommand
// @grant        GM_openInTab
// @grant        GM_log
// @connect      raw.githubusercontent.com
// @require      https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/axios@0.25.0/dist/axios.min.js
// @require      https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/qs@6.10.3/dist/qs.min.js
// @require      https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jquery@3.5.1/dist/jquery.min.js
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    /* ===== Core API Functionality ===== */
    const pageBaseUrlMap = {
        'twitter.com': 'twitter.com',
        'x.com': 'x.com',
    };

    function getPageBaseUrl() {
        const hostname = window.location.hostname;
        return pageBaseUrlMap[hostname] || 'twitter.com';
    }

    const apiBaseUrlMap = {
        'twitter.com': 'https://api.twitter.com',
        'x.com': 'https://api.x.com',
    };

    function getApiBaseUrl() {
        const hostname = window.location.hostname;
        return apiBaseUrlMap[hostname] || 'https://api.twitter.com';
    }

    const basePageUrl = getPageBaseUrl();

    function get_cookie(cname) {
        const name = cname + '=';
        const ca = document.cookie.split(';');
        for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; ++i) {
            const c = ca[i].trim();
            if (c.indexOf(name) === 0) {
                return c.substring(name.length, c.length);
            }
        }
        return '';
    }

    // Create API client
    /* global axios Qs */
    const apiClient = axios.create({
        withCredentials: true,
        headers: {
            Authorization: 'Bearer AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANRILgAAAAAAnNwIzUejRCOuH5E6I8xnZz4puTs%3D1Zv7ttfk8LF81IUq16cHjhLTvJu4FA33AGWWjCpTnA',
            'X-Twitter-Auth-Type': 'OAuth2Session',
            'X-Twitter-Active-User': 'yes',
            'X-Csrf-Token': get_cookie('ct0')
        }
    });

    // Set correct baseURL before requests
    apiClient.interceptors.request.use(config => {
        config.baseURL = getApiBaseUrl();
        return config;
    });

    /* ===== List and User Fetching Functions ===== */
    
    // Extract list ID from URL
    function parseListId(url) {
        return url.split('lists/')[1].split('/')[0];
    }

    async function fetchRemoteList(listId) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            GM_xmlhttpRequest({
                method: "GET",
                url: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/daymade/Twitter-Block-Porn/master/lists/${listId}.json`,
                onload: function(response) {
                    if (response.status === 200) {
                        resolve(JSON.parse(response.responseText));
                    } else {
                        console.warn(`Remote list for listId ${listId} not found.`);
                        resolve([]);
                    }
                },
                onerror: function() {
                    console.warn(`Error fetching remote list for listId ${listId}.`);
                    resolve([]);
                }
            });
        });
    }

    async function fetchTwitterListMembers(listId) {
        let cursor = -1;
        let allMembers = [];
        
        while (cursor && cursor !== 0) {
            try {
                let response = await apiClient.get(`/1.1/lists/members.json?list_id=${listId}&cursor=${cursor}`);
                if (!response.data.users) {
                    GM_log(`fetchTwitterListMembers errors: ${JSON.stringify(response.data)}`);
                    return allMembers;
                }
                let users = response.data.users;
                allMembers = allMembers.concat(users);
                cursor = response.data.next_cursor;
            } catch (error) {
                GM_log(`Error fetching Twitter list members: ${error}`);
                return allMembers;
            }
        }
        
        return allMembers;
    }

    async function fetchAndMergeLists(listId) {
        try {
            let [remoteList, twitterList] = await Promise.all([
                fetchRemoteList(listId),
                fetchTwitterListMembers(listId)
            ]);

            // Merge lists. Ensure uniqueness by 'id_str'.
            let merged = [...twitterList, ...remoteList];
            let uniqueMembers = Array.from(new Map(merged.map(item => [item["id_str"], item])).values());
            
            return uniqueMembers;
        } catch (err) {
            console.error('Promise.all error:', err);
            return [];
        }
    }

    async function fetch_list_members_id(listId) {
        try {
            let users = await fetchAndMergeLists(listId);
            return users.map(u => u.id_str);
        } catch (error) {
            GM_log(`Error in fetch_list_members_id: ${error}`);
            return [];
        }
    }

    /* ===== Blocking Functions ===== */
    
    async function block_user(id, listId) {
        try {
            await apiClient.post('/1.1/blocks/create.json', Qs.stringify({
                user_id: id
            }), {
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'
                }
            });
            
            // Update blocked IDs list in GM storage
            let blocked = GM_getValue('blockedIdsMapping', {});
            if (!blocked[listId]) {
                blocked[listId] = [];
            }
            blocked[listId].push(id);
            GM_setValue('blockedIdsMapping', blocked);
            
            // Increment today's blocked count
            let todayBlocked = GM_getValue('todayBlocked', 0);
            GM_setValue('todayBlocked', todayBlocked + 1);
            
            return true;
        } catch (err) {
            GM_log(`Error occurs when block_user: ${err}`);
            return false;
        }
    }

    async function block_by_ids(member_ids, listId) {
        let blocked = GM_getValue('blockedIdsMapping', {});
        
        let suspended = await fetchRemoteList('suspended');
        
        let toBlock = member_ids
                        .filter(id => !blocked[listId] || !blocked[listId].includes(id))
                        .filter(id => !suspended.some(s => s.id_str === id));

        const ids = [...new Set(toBlock)];
        
        if (ids.length === 0) {
            return 0; // No new users to block
        }

        GM_log(`block_by_ids: about to block ${ids.length} accounts`);

        // Number of requests per batch
        const batchSize = 10;
        // 5s delay between batches
        const delay = 5000;

        let failedIds = [];
        let successCount = 0;

        for (let i = 0; i < Math.ceil(ids.length / batchSize); i++) {
            const batch = ids.slice(i * batchSize, (i + 1) * batchSize);
            
            // Update progress
            updateProgress(Math.min(((i + 1) * batchSize / ids.length) * 100, 95));
            
            const results = await Promise.allSettled(batch.map(id => block_user(id, listId)));

            for (const [index, result] of results.entries()) {
                if (result.status === 'fulfilled' && result.value === true) {
                    successCount++;
                } else if (result.reason && result.reason.response && result.reason.response.status === 404) {
                    failedIds.push(batch[index]);
                }
            }

            if (i < Math.ceil(ids.length / batchSize) - 1) {
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
            }
        }

        if (failedIds.length > 0) {
            GM_log(`block_by_ids: failed to block these accounts: ${failedIds.join(', ')}`);
        }
        
        // Complete progress
        updateProgress(100);
        
        return successCount;
    }

    async function block_special_list() {
        // Special list: active/aggressive/problematic accounts
        const special_scammers = [
            "1626262000547377153", "1083844806", "1191513095774048256", "1240432468995473411",
            "1260746375010177033", "1287994653388623875", "1356533851250548737", "1367769524657786883",
            "1371653074217963522", "1413745607466885121", "1428063931130646531", "1450954075084713986",
            "1455789588392202241", "1484792482357338113", "1489964205310570498", "1511380196",
            "1559311298986393603", "1562212902207033345", "1572580165900767234", "1578298585514668032",
            "1580799004983508992", "1583905468178567168", "1585644302381694976", "1589228466658250752",
            "1592249768771977216", "1592260043490983936", "1592573920905166849", "1592691909805604870",
            "1593155334742618112", "1593157357059837954", "1593620049704628224", "1593948516594102272",
            "1602373747344048128", "1616646252", "1616785364462743553", "1622437704159100929",
            "1623320122978099201", "1624527915663896576", "1626772507910082562", "1639847615981568001",
            "1650736618293133313", "1655041846790467585", "1655821795272937472", "1656797676820725761",
            "1658357788249321472", "1660685299930759168", "1665333981951172608", "1670444198586363904",
            "1671941042776702976", "1672954423663038466", "1673741619634241536", "1675179645870768128",
            "1676435725942661121", "1676489900021915648", "1679909362335354880", "1683326796488671232",
            "1683330763167780864", "1684583392665550850", "1684659885726916609", "1684743661853229056",
            "1684859751119847424", "1685367331013476352", "1685884844885295104", "1686221264023957504",
            "1687807818831986688", "1687816807766523905", "1688494198331420672", "1689943762531753985",
            "1690427325001904128", "175911002", "2802758389", "310749736", "3183558127", "532085468",
            "593711290", "769695361656991744", "824376009029992456", "976566332111179778"
        ];

        // `block` is a reserved listId for those accounts that have blocked the user
        // see block.json in `lists` folder
        let scammers = await fetchRemoteList("block");
        let blockedIds = scammers.map(u => u.id_str || u);
        
        return await block_by_ids([...special_scammers, ...blockedIds], "block");
    }

    // Function to count total unique blocked users
    function countTotalBlockedUsers() {
        const blocked = GM_getValue('blockedIdsMapping', {});
        const allIds = Object.values(blocked).flat();
        return new Set(allIds).size;
    }

    // Demo function for quick block 20 users (using a subset of special_scammers)
    async function quickBlock20() {
        const special_scammers = [
            "1626262000547377153", "1083844806", "1191513095774048256", "1240432468995473411",
            "1260746375010177033", "1287994653388623875", "1356533851250548737", "1367769524657786883",
            "1371653074217963522", "1413745607466885121", "1428063931130646531", "1450954075084713986",
            "1455789588392202241", "1484792482357338113", "1489964205310570498", "1511380196",
            "1559311298986393603", "1562212902207033345", "1572580165900767234", "1578298585514668032"
        ];
        
        return await block_by_ids(special_scammers, "quick_block");
    }

    // Export blocked IDs mapping to JSON file
    function exportBlockedIds() {
        const blocked = GM_getValue('blockedIdsMapping', {});
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(blocked, null, 2)], {type: 'application/json'});
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = `xblocker-export-${Date.now()}.json`;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        document.body.removeChild(a);

    }

    /* ===== UI Implementation ===== */
    
    // Inject advanced styles
    GM_addStyle(`
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;900&display=swap');
        
        /* Main Control Center */
        .xbc-control {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            z-index: 999999;

        }
        
        /* Minimized State - Floating Orb */
        .xbc-orb {

        }
        
        .xbc-orb-icon {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            fill: white;
            filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2));
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-orb.active .xbc-orb-icon {
            transform: rotate(45deg);
        }
        
        /* Notification Badge */
        .xbc-badge {
            position: absolute;
            top: -4px;
            right: -4px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff3b3b, #ff6b6b);
            color: white;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 700;
            padding: 2px 6px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(255, 59, 59, 0.4);
            animation: badgePulse 2s infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes badgePulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
        }
        
        /* Expanded Panel */
        .xbc-panel {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 70px;
            right: 0;
            width: 380px;
            max-height: 600px;
            background: #15202b;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.95);
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .xbc-panel.active {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            pointer-events: all;
        }
        
        /* Panel Header */
        .xbc-header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1DA1F2 0%, #0d8bd9 100%);
            padding: 20px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .xbc-header:before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            left: -50%;
            width: 200%;
            height: 200%;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                45deg,
                transparent,
                transparent 10px,
                rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 10px,
                rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 20px
            );
            animation: headerPattern 20s linear infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes headerPattern {
            0% { transform: translate(0, 0); }
            100% { transform: translate(28px, 28px); }
        }
        
        .xbc-header-content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        
        .xbc-title {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: white;
            margin: 0 0 4px 0;
            text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        
        .xbc-subtitle {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        /* Quick Stats Bar */
        .xbc-stats-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }
        
        .xbc-stat-pill {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .xbc-stat-pill-icon {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 10px;
        }
        
        /* Action Buttons Container */
        .xbc-actions {
            padding: 20px;
            background: #192734;
        }
        
        /* Quick Action Buttons */
        .xbc-quick-actions {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .xbc-quick-btn {
            background: #253341;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 16px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .xbc-quick-btn:hover {
            background: #2d3e4e;
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
        }
        
        .xbc-quick-btn:active {
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
        
        .xbc-quick-btn-icon {
            font-size: 24px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            display: block;
        }
        
        .xbc-quick-btn-label {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #8899a6;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        
        .xbc-quick-btn-value {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-top: 2px;
        }
        
        /* Power Actions */
        .xbc-power-section {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .xbc-section-title {
            font-size: 12px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #8899a6;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 14px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1DA1F2 0%, #0d8bd9 100%);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn:before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: -100%;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn:hover:before {
            left: 100%;
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.4);
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn.danger {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff3b3b 0%, #ff6b6b 100%);
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn.danger:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(255, 59, 59, 0.4);
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn.secondary {
            background: #253341;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
        }
        
        .xbc-power-btn.secondary:hover {
            background: #2d3e4e;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
        }
        
        /* AI Filter Toggle */
        .xbc-ai-section {
            background: #253341;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-toggle {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-label {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-icon {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .xbc-switch {
            position: relative;
            width: 48px;
            height: 26px;
            background: #38444d;
            border-radius: 13px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-switch.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        }
        
        .xbc-switch-thumb {
            position: absolute;
            top: 3px;
            left: 3px;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }
        
        .xbc-switch.active .xbc-switch-thumb {
            transform: translateX(22px);
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-stats {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-stat {
            flex: 1;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-stat-value {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #667eea;
        }
        
        .xbc-ai-stat-label {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #8899a6;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }
        
        /* Footer */
        .xbc-footer {
            padding: 16px 20px;
            background: #15202b;
            border-top: 1px solid #38444d;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
        
        .xbc-footer-link {
            color: #8899a6;
            font-size: 12px;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-footer-link:hover {
            color: #1DA1F2;
        }
        
        /* Loading State */
        .xbc-loading {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: rgba(15, 20, 27, 0.95);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .xbc-loading.active {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: all;
        }
        
        .xbc-loader {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: 3px solid rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.3);
            border-top-color: #1DA1F2;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        
        /* Progress Bar */
        .xbc-progress {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 3px;
            background: rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.2);
            overflow: hidden;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-progress.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        .xbc-progress-bar {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1DA1F2, #0d8bd9);
            width: 0%;
            transition: width 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        /* Tooltips */
        .xbc-tooltip {
            position: absolute;
            background: #15202b;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: white;
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
            z-index: 20;
        }
        
        .xbc-tooltip.show {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        /* Animations */
        @keyframes slideIn {
            from {
                transform: translateX(100%);
                opacity: 0;
            }
            to {
                transform: translateX(0);
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }
        
        .xbc-slide-in {
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-out;
        }
        
        /* Notification */
        .xbc-notification {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 100px;
            right: 20px;
            background: #1DA1F2;
            color: white;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(29, 161, 242, 0.4);
            z-index: 999999;
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-out;
        }
        
        @keyframes slideOut {
            to {
                transform: translateX(150%);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }
        
        /* Whitelist Modal */
        .xbc-modal {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 1000000;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal.active {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: all;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-content {
            background: #15202b;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            border-radius: 16px;
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 400px;
            padding: 24px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: white;
            margin: 0 0 16px 0;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            background: #253341;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            border-radius: 8px;
            color: white;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #1DA1F2;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-btn-cancel {
            background: #253341;
            border: 1px solid #38444d;
            color: #8899a6;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-btn-cancel:hover {
            background: #2d3e4e;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-btn-confirm {
            background: #1DA1F2;
            border: none;
            color: white;
        }
        
        .xbc-modal-btn-confirm:hover {
            background: #0d8bd9;
        }
    `);
