```javascript
    function initializeEventListeners() {
        const orb = document.getElementById('xbc-orb');
        const panel = document.getElementById('xbc-panel');
        const aiSwitch = document.getElementById('xbc-ai-switch');
        
        // Toggle panel
        orb.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            orb.classList.toggle('active', isExpanded);
            panel.classList.toggle('active', isExpanded);
            
            if (isExpanded) {
                panel.classList.add('xbc-slide-in');
                // Update stats when panel is opened
                updateStats();
            }
        });
        
        // Quick actions
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-block').addEventListener('click', async () => {
            if (isProcessing) return;
            
            showLoading(true);
            showProgress(true);
            isProcessing = true;
            
            try {
                const blockedCount = await quickBlock20();
                showNotification(`Successfully blocked ${blockedCount} accounts!`);
                
                // Update today's blocked count
                stats.todayBlocked += blockedCount;
                
                // Update total blocked count
                stats.blocked = countTotalBlockedUsers();
                
                updateStats();
            } catch (error) {
                showNotification('Error blocking accounts. Please try again.', 'error');
            } finally {
                isProcessing = false;
                showLoading(false);
                showProgress(false);
            }
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-mute').addEventListener('click', () => {
            showNotification('Mute functionality coming soon!');
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-hide').addEventListener('click', () => {
            showNotification('Auto-hide functionality coming soon!');
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-quick-whitelist').addEventListener('click', () => {
            showWhitelistModal();
        });
        
        // AI toggle
        aiSwitch.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isAiEnabled = !isAiEnabled;
            aiSwitch.classList.toggle('active', isAiEnabled);
            GM_setValue('aiFilterEnabled', isAiEnabled);
            showNotification(isAiEnabled ? 'AI Filter Enabled' : 'AI Filter Disabled');
        });
        
        // Power actions
        document.getElementById('xbc-nuke-comments').addEventListener('click', async () => {
            if (isProcessing) return;
            
            if (confirm('This will block ALL known spam accounts from the database. Continue?')) {
                showLoading(true);
                showProgress(true);
                isProcessing = true;
                
                try {
                    const blockedCount = await block_special_list();
                    showNotification(`Successfully nuked ${blockedCount} spam accounts!`);
                    
                    // Update today's blocked count
                    stats.todayBlocked += blockedCount;
                    
                    // Update total blocked count
                    stats.blocked = countTotalBlockedUsers();
                    
                    updateStats();
                } catch (error) {
                    showNotification('Error nuking spam accounts. Please try again.', 'error');
                } finally {
                    isProcessing = false;
                    showLoading(false);
                    showProgress(false);
                }
            }
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-emergency-block').addEventListener('click', async () => {
            if (isProcessing) return;
            
            showLoading(true);
            showProgress(true);
            isProcessing = true;
            
            try {
                const blockedCount = await block_special_list();
                showNotification(`Emergency block successful! Blocked ${blockedCount} accounts.`);
                
                // Update today's blocked count
                stats.todayBlocked += blockedCount;
                
                // Update total blocked count
                stats.blocked = countTotalBlockedUsers();
                
                updateStats();
            } catch (error) {
                showNotification('Error executing emergency block. Please try again.', 'error');
            } finally {
                isProcessing = false;
                showLoading(false);
                showProgress(false);
            }
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-scan-page').addEventListener('click', () => {
            showNotification('Deep scan functionality coming soon!');
        });
        
        // Footer links
        document.getElementById('xbc-settings').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            showNotification('Settings panel coming soon!');
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-lists').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            GM_openInTab(`https://${basePageUrl}/i/lists/1677334530754248706/members`, {active: true});
        });
        
        // Whitelist modal
        document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-cancel').addEventListener('click', () => {
            hideWhitelistModal();
        });
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-confirm').addEventListener('click', () => {
            const username = document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-input').value.trim();
            if (username) {
                addToWhitelist(username);
                hideWhitelistModal();
            }
        });
        
        // Close panel when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (isExpanded && !e.target.closest('.xbc-control')) {
                isExpanded = false;
                orb.classList.remove('active');
                panel.classList.remove('active');
            }
        });
    }
    
    function showWhitelistModal() {
        document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-modal').classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-input').focus();
    }
    
    function hideWhitelistModal() {
        document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-modal').classList.remove('active');
        document.getElementById('xbc-whitelist-input').value = '';
    }
    
    function addToWhitelist(username) {
        // Remove @ if present
        username = username.replace('@', '');
        
        if (!whitelistedUsers.includes(username)) {
            whitelistedUsers.push(username);
            GM_setValue('whitelistedUsers', whitelistedUsers);
            showNotification(`Added @${username} to whitelist`);
        } else {
            showNotification(`@${username} is already whitelisted`);
        }
    }
    
    function showLoading(show) {
        document.getElementById('xbc-loading').classList.toggle('active', show);
    }
    
    function showProgress(show) {
        document.getElementById('xbc-progress').classList.toggle('active', show);
        if (!show) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                updateProgress(0);
            }, 300);
        }
    }
    
    function updateProgress(percent) {
        document.getElementById('xbc-progress-bar').style.width = percent + '%';
    }
    
    function updateStats() {
        // Recalculate blocked count from storage
        stats.blocked = countTotalBlockedUsers();
        
        document.getElementById('xbc-stat-blocked').textContent = stats.blocked;
        document.getElementById('xbc-stat-hidden').textContent = stats.hidden;
        document.getElementById('xbc-stat-today').textContent = stats.todayBlocked;
        document.getElementById('xbc-ai-filtered').textContent = stats.aiFiltered;
        
        GM_setValue('totalHidden', stats.hidden);
        GM_setValue('todayBlocked', stats.todayBlocked);
        GM_setValue('aiFiltered', stats.aiFiltered);
    }
    
    function updateBadge() {
        const badge = document.getElementById('xbc-badge');
        
        // Check if there are pending block lists that should be processed
        const pendingActions = 0; // Replace with actual check if needed
        
        if (pendingActions > 0) {
            badge.textContent = pendingActions;
            badge.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            badge.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }
    
    function showNotification(message, type = 'info') {
        // Create notification
        const notif = document.createElement('div');
        notif.className = 'xbc-notification';
        
        // Apply different styles based on type
        if (type === 'error') {
            notif.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg, #ff3b3b 0%, #ff6b6b 100%)';
        }
        
        notif.textContent = message;
        document.body.appendChild(notif);
        
        // Remove after 3 seconds
        setTimeout(() => {
            notif.style.animation = 'slideOut 0.3s ease-out';
            setTimeout(() => notif.remove(), 300);
        }, 3000);
    }
    
    // Register menu commands
    GM_registerMenuCommand('Open X Blocker Control', () => {
        const orb = document.getElementById('xbc-orb');
        const panel = document.getElementById('xbc-panel');
        
        isExpanded = true;
        orb.classList.add('active');
        panel.classList.add('active');
        panel.classList.add('xbc-slide-in');
    });
    
    GM_registerMenuCommand('Emergency Block', async () => {
        if (isProcessing) {
            showNotification('Already processing, please wait...', 'error');
            return;
        }
        
        showNotification('Starting emergency block...');
        isProcessing = true;
        
        try {
            const blockedCount = await block_special_list();
            showNotification(`Emergency block successful! Blocked ${blockedCount} accounts.`);
            
            // Update today's blocked count
            stats.todayBlocked += blockedCount;
            
            // Update total blocked count
            stats.blocked = countTotalBlockedUsers();
            
            updateStats();
        } catch (error) {
            showNotification('Error executing emergency block. Please try again.', 'error');
        } finally {
            isProcessing = false;
        }
    });
    
    GM_registerMenuCommand('Export Block Data', () => {
        exportBlockedIds();
        showNotification('Block data exported successfully!');
    });
    
    // Initialize when page loads
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', createControlCenter);
    } else {
        createControlCenter();
    }
    
    // Reset today's stats at midnight
    const now = new Date();
    const tomorrow = new Date(now);
    tomorrow.setDate(tomorrow.getDate() + 1);
    tomorrow.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const msUntilMidnight = tomorrow - now;
    
    setTimeout(() => {
        stats.todayBlocked = 0;
        GM_setValue('todayBlocked', 0);
        updateStats();
        
        // Then reset every 24 hours
        setInterval(() => {
            stats.todayBlocked = 0;
            GM_setValue('todayBlocked', 0);
            updateStats();
        }, 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    }, msUntilMidnight);
    
})();
```

This code now integrates the blocking functionality from your original script with the new UI. Key features include:

1. **Quick Block**: The "Quick Block" button now blocks 20 test accounts.
2. **Emergency Block**: The "Emergency Block List" button blocks known spam accounts from your special list.
3. **Whitelist**: The whitelist functionality allows users to protect accounts from being blocked.
4. **Block Lists Link**: The "Block Lists" link in the footer opens the main shared block list.
5. **UI Feedback**: Loading indicators, progress bars, and notifications provide feedback during blocking operations.
6. **Statistics**: The stats display is dynamic, showing your total blocked accounts, hidden content, today's blocks, and AI-filtered content.
7. **Menu Commands**: Quick access to the control panel, emergency blocking, and data export via GM menu commands.

Future enhancements could include:
- Implementing the "Deep Scan" functionality to identify spam comments on the current page
- Adding a settings panel with more configuration options
- Implementing the mute functionality
- Adding the ability to customize AI filtering thresholds
- Implementing page-specific blocking for comments

The UI is now fully functional for blocking operations, and the code structure is modular enough to easily add more features in the future.
